name: Bay Meadows Family Golf Course
address: 5550 Bay Meadows Dr, Traverse City, MI 49684
about: Bay Meadows Family Golf Course is a family-owned and operated facility in Traverse City, established in 1995. It offers a rolling 9-hole par 34 course and a challenging 9-hole par 3 course, complemented by extensive practice amenities including a driving range with 12 mat stations and endless turf tees. The venue is home to a premier indoor-outdoor Learning Center equipped with Trackman 4 launch monitors, K-Motion body sensors, and state-of-the-art video analysis, providing year-round instruction for all skill levels. The facility prides itself on being a welcoming environment where beginners learn and experts practice, supported by PGA instructors and a focus on family-friendly service and conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman 4 and K-Motion technology for precise swing and ball analysis
Comprehensive indoor-outdoor learning center with PGA instructors for year-round training
Family-friendly environment with dedicated junior programs and practice facilities

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; external shop available (Par Above)

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman 4 launch monitor with K-Motion body sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs, though custom club fitting services are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned, but there is an external pro shop (Par Above) available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue offers a 9-hole regulation course and a 9-hole par 3 course; full 18-hole times would depend on play pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bay Meadows offers extensive junior golf programs, including winter, spring, summer, and fall clinics, making it very kid-friendly.
